children.heading: Duties of Secretary of Agriculture
children.label: a Duties of Secretary of Agriculture
A
children.text: shall prescribe rules requiring each such program or agency to participate in good faith in any State mediation program certified under ;section 5101 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: shall participate in mediation programs certified under ; andsection 5101 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: cooperate in good faith with requests for information or analysis of information made in the course of mediation under any mediation program certified under ; andsection 5101 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: if applicable, present and explore debt restructuring proposals advanced in the course of such mediation.

children.heading: Nonbinding on Secretary
children.label: 2 Nonbinding on Secretary
children.text: The Secretary shall not be bound by any determination made in a program described in if the Secretary has not agreed to such determination.section 5101 of this title

children.heading: Duties of Farm Credit Administration
children.label: b Duties of Farm Credit Administration

children.text: to cooperate in good faith with requests for information or analysis of information made in the course of mediation under any mediation program described in ; andsection 5101 of this title
to present and explore debt restructuring proposals advanced in the course of such mediation.
